name: DAST Finding Triage
description: Automated triage for Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) findings. Riggs AI verifies exploitability of the runtime vulnerability, checks if the finding is a true positive, and routes confirmed exploitable issues to development with a fix ticket. False positives are closed with documentation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create fix tickets for confirmed exploitable DAST findings

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the application security team about exploitable vulnerabilities

data.title: DAST Finding Received
data.summary: Triggers when a DAST scanner reports a runtime vulnerability

config.description: Ingests findings from DAST tools such as OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, or Nuclei

data.title: AI Exploitability Assessment
data.summary: Riggs AI evaluates whether the DAST finding is truly exploitable

config.additional_instructions: Analyze the DAST finding for real-world exploitability. Check the OWASP category, HTTP evidence, request/response pairs, and whether the vulnerability can be triggered by an unauthenticated attacker. Distinguish true positives from scanner false positives.
config.description: AI-powered exploitability verification using the vuln_risk analysis template

data.title: Confirmed Exploitable?
data.summary: Route based on whether the AI confirms the finding is exploitable

data.title: Critical Severity?
data.summary: Check if the exploitable finding is critical severity requiring approval

data.title: AppSec Lead Approval
data.summary: Require AppSec lead sign-off before creating critical fix ticket

config.description: Require application security lead approval for critical exploitable findings

data.title: Create Fix Ticket in Jira
data.summary: Create a prioritized Jira ticket for the development team to fix the vulnerability

config.description: Create a Jira ticket with full DAST finding details and remediation steps

data.title: Notify AppSec Team
data.summary: Send Slack notification to the application security channel

data.title: Close as False Positive
data.summary: Mark the DAST finding as a false positive with AI justification

config.note: DAST finding assessed as not exploitable by AI analysis. Reason: {{analyze-1.result.false_positive_reason}}. Closing as false positive.

data.title: End — Fix Ticket Created
data.summary: Exploitable DAST finding triaged and assigned for remediation

config.summary: DAST finding confirmed exploitable. Fix ticket created and AppSec team notified.

data.title: End — False Positive Closed
data.summary: DAST finding determined to be a false positive

config.summary: DAST finding assessed as not exploitable. Closed as false positive with AI justification.
